name: Digital Twin Inquiry Archive, Session 47-A
description: Recovered interview between Ezekiel Ruban and Dr. James Tan for the Voyager 1 Preservation Project.
excerpt: AI will never have consciousness. Or maybe it will. No one knows. But they are perfect actors.

name: Project 2008 Shadow NET Correspondence
description: Letter from President McCarthy to Agent Johnny describing 00, the Shadow NET, Necro-agents, and a new dawn framed through Edenic imagery.
excerpt: I have already prepared the Shadow NET, where people from the new NET will be monitored and protected by Necro-agents secretly.

name: Voyager 1 Foreign Probe Detection
description: Notice that Voyager 1 detected another Voyager 1 drifting in interstellar space with encrypted historical files.
excerpt: The source of the message and its intended recipient remain unknown.

name: Project 2008 Draft
description: First written form of McCarthy's plan to establish a digital utopia by 2008 and treat ghosts as real humans.

name: Operation Omega Termination Directive
description: Reconstructed directive describing the campaign to eliminate Necro-intelligence and terminate the old NET.
excerpt: Operation Omega was tasked with eliminating Necro-intelligence.
